purpose: Generate personalized data. Create investment through Minis context. Provide concrete numbers for scale comparison.
visual: Minis characters appear in animated counting scenario.
guide: "The Minis are having a busy day! Help count what they're up to."

game_specifications.categories: 3 (e.g., Red Minis, Blue Minis, Green Minis)
game_specifications.values: Multiples of 5 only: 10, 15, 20, 25, or 30 per category
game_specifications.student_interaction: Count items; confirm/input count for each category

task: Student participates in counting activity, tracking count for each of 3 categories.
on_complete: Game ends; counts recorded for next interaction.
design_note: All values MUST be multiples of 5 AND large enough to show efficiency difference. Target range: 10-30. Values like 20, 25, 30 show the clearest difference between scales.
